title: PulseAI: Heart Health Monitor
description: Developing a machine learning-powered smartwatch prototype for heart health monitoring with GSM alerts, real-time cloud sync, and anomaly detection algorithms.

title: ProcSAGE - Host Threat Detection
description: Python-based ML model to detect anomalies in system calls for enhanced endpoint security. Published at IEEE ESCI 2025 conference.

title: Network Scanner Pro
description: An academic project showing network and cybersecurity related functionalities.

title: HarvestLink - A Marketplace for Farmers
description: Developed a full-stack web application connecting farmers with buyers using Python Flask for backend.

title: FinAI - NLP Financial Chatbot
description: Built a finance-focused chatbot for Google Dev Solution Challenge using Python and Flask Framework. Provides market-based recommendations with legal insights.

title: PigGame Backend System
description: Developed the backend for a two-player dice-based game using JavaScript. Implemented Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm for fair and human-like dice rolls.

title: Parkinson's Predictor AI Chatbot
description: Built an AI chatbot using Python and Gradio to assess risks of Parkinson's disease using symptom inputs. Focused on early diagnosis support.

title: SecureVault: Local Password Manager
description: On a personal quest, built a local storage based password system. It manipulates JSONs. Stores passwords in groups.

title: MazeSolver: Maze Gen and Maze Path
description: Built a maze generator and maze solver with path visualization using DFS and BFS searching algorithms

title: To Do List App
description: Developed a ToDo List application as part of my academia showing data structure skills.
